hero.description: Managex offers tailored business services in marketing, design, accounting, and HR — powered by smart systems and deep market insight.

about.title: Ghaymah Al-Etihrafiyah Commercial Establishment
about.subtitle: ManageEx Brand
about.description: Ghaymah Al-Etihrafiyah is a Saudi commercial establishment (branded as ManageEx) is your strategic partner in delivering integrated business solutions that drive growth and operational efficiency. Our service portfolio spans marketing and branding, design, advanced accounting systems, and human resources management.
about.commitment: We are committed to empowering entrepreneurs and business owners by offering high-quality, cost-effective services designed to optimize resources, streamline operations, and enable you to focus on scaling your core business activities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We strive for excellence and leadership in delivering administrative solutions to businesses, with a strong commitment to precision, cost efficiency, and adherence to the highest quality standards. Our approach is rooted in simplicity and transparency, ensuring a seamless and distinguished client experience.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At ManageEx, we provide comprehensive solutions that support businesses in enhancing efficiency, reducing costs, and streamlining operations. With our professional team and innovative technologies, we empower our clients to achieve their strategic goals and strengthen their market impact, while ensuring the delivery of integrated services that elevate their operations to new levels of excellence and leadership.

strategy.title: Our Strategy
strategy.quality: Quality: Leveraging technology and continuous team training to achieve the highest quality standards.
strategy.cost: Cost: Reducing human resources costs by 50% through a professional team and optimized execution time.
strategy.time: Time: Continuously improving processes to ensure efficiency and effectiveness.
strategy.simplicity: Simplicity: Streamlining operations to deliver fast and efficient service.
strategy.control: Control: Implementing a rigorous review system to ensure service quality.

services.title: We offer services tailored specifically to meet your needs
services.subtitle: You Name IT We Make IT.
services.youNameItTitle: You Name IT We Make IT

accounting.title: Accounting Solutions
accounting.description: ManageEX provides comprehensive accounting solutions to help businesses manage their finances and ensure compliance with legal and accounting standards. Our goal is to deliver accurate, professional services that enhance financial performance and support business growth.

services.financial: Financial Solutions - Balance Sheet preparation, Income Statement preparation, Cash Flow Statement preparation
services.bookkeeping: Bookkeeping - Recording and organizing financial transactions, tracking revenues and expenses, preparing periodic reports
services.tax: Tax Management & Filing - Preparing and submitting tax returns, tax planning to minimize legal liabilities
services.payroll: Payroll & Compensation Management - Calculating salaries and preparing payroll sheets, handling tax and social insurance deductions
services.auditing: Financial Auditing & Review - Auditing accounting operations to ensure accuracy and integrity
services.analysis: Financial Analysis & Planning - Delivering in-depth financial analysis to support decision-making

hr.title: HR Solutions
hr.description: ManageEX offers integrated, modern HR solutions that empower companies to build strong teams and achieve optimal operational efficiency. We support our clients in managing their human resources professionally while ensuring compliance with internal policies and labor regulations.

services.recruitment: Recruitment & Talent Acquisition - Identifying suitable candidates based on job requirements, screening applicants and conducting initial interviews
services.management: Employee Affairs Management - Preparing employment contracts and managing employee files in compliance with current legal frameworks
services.training: Training & Development - Creating and delivering customized training programs based on staff needs and company goals
services.performance: Performance Management & Competency Evaluation - Setting performance metrics aligned with business goals and strategic vision
services.consulting: HR Consulting - Offering solutions to improve workplace culture and increase employee loyalty

marketing.title: Marketing Services
marketing.description: ManageEx offers comprehensive marketing solutions to help businesses strengthen their online presence, engage effectively with customers, and achieve sustainable growth. We design and implement tailored marketing strategies using compelling content, well-planned advertising campaigns, and performance analytics to ensure optimal results.

services.social: Social Media Management - Managing multiple accounts on social media platforms, monthly content plan that reflects the project's identity
services.content: Content Creation - Writing compelling marketing content that reflects your brand and builds trust, producing high-quality short videos (Reels)
services.advertising: Paid Advertising Campaigns - Designing and managing targeted ad campaigns across various platforms
services.seo: Search Engine Optimization - Comprehensive analysis of keywords related to the target field, optimizing website structure and content

design.title: Design Services
design.description: ManageEx offers professional design solutions that reflect your brand identity and strengthen your market presence. From logos to marketing visuals, we develop cohesive visual elements that inspire trust and attract attention — helping you build a strong, reliable brand image.

services.identity: Brand Identity Design - Custom logo design that accurately reflects your brand essence, brand guidelines including color schemes
services.profiles: Company Profiles & Presentations - Visually appealing and professionally written company profiles, innovative presentation designs
services.social: Social Media Visual Content - Interactive and consistent post designs aligned with your brand identity
services.packaging: Packaging & Print Materials - Design menus, packaging, and bags that reflect brand quality and enhance customer experience
services.motion: Motion Graphics & Video Production - Engaging animated videos that deliver your message with clarity

webDevelopment.title: Web Development
webDevelopment.description: At ManageEx, we offer comprehensive website design services that deliver a seamless digital experience—from concept to the launch of a professional website that accurately reflects your brand identity. We focus on crafting visually appealing, user-friendly interfaces while ensuring high performance and full compatibility across all devices.

features.custom: Custom design that reflects your business identity
features.performance: High loading speed and optimized performance
features.integration: Integrated with social media and marketing tools

business.title: Business Services
business.subtitle: Customized services, just for you
business.description: At ManageEx, we understand that entrepreneurs need more than just strong ideas — they need a solid administrative foundation that supports their journey. That's why our Business Services offer integrated solutions designed to empower companies, drive sustainable growth, and enhance operational efficiency — all while keeping full focus on core objectives.

whyChooseUs.title: Why ManageEx
whyChooseUs.description: ManageEx is a leading provider of specialized business services, including digital marketing, creative design, accounting, and human resources. We offer flexible, tailor-made solutions designed to meet each client's operational and financial needs. Our goal is to help businesses grow and improve efficiency through smart administrative systems and professional services built on deep market and client insight.
whyChooseUs.challenges: We help companies overcome the challenges caused by administrative energy drain and high human resource costs through:

solutions.management: Full or partial management of companies
solutions.cost: Cost reduction thanks to a trained and specialized team
solutions.efficiency: Enhanced operational efficiency and simplified administrative procedures for effective performance
solutions.training: A high-level training system to boost team capabilities
solutions.followup: A dedicated follow-up department to ensure quality

measuring.title: Measuring Success
measuring.description: Our clients can measure success through reduced costs and a smoother workflow experience.
